about.title: Beyond the Atmosphere.
about.defaultBio: Astrophotography is a technical dance with physics. My journey involves thousands of light frames, hours of integration, and a dedication to revealing what remains invisible to the naked eye.

hero.subtitle: Documenting the Cosmos
hero.defaultDescription: I am a professional astrophotographer capturing the silent majesty of deep-space phenomena. My work bridges the gap between scientific observation and cinematic fine art.
